case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JAIME MARTINEZ JAUREZ

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT JAIME MARTINEZ JAUREZ. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED.(506)
